case_title: MID CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MANUEL EVANS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-05-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-26-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
